identity.title: Another Year Looks Good on You [Happy Birthday Song]
identity.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (143 BPM) G minor groove driven by a syncopated drum kit and warm synth pads that underpin smooth R&B vocal runs, creating an upbeat yet intimate atmosphere perfect for a birthday toast.

lyrics.text:
Yeah,
this one's for you
On your day
Happy birthday, baby
You already know
You don't need a spotlight
You walk in, they see you
Soft air falling down like midnight over you
Phone lighting up again
Messages on screen
Voice know what you're smiling at
That's my favorite melody
You got that birthday glow
That nobody can fake
Turn it one more year
You still look 28
Salon ready queen
Hands making art move
Every color on those nails
Still ain't pretty as you
And I don't need a wish tonight
I already got mine
Wrapped in a birthday dress
Looking way too fine
Te amo, baby
Copalanga, it's true
Cada año más bonito
Just to have more you
Another year looks
Good on you
Good on you, good on you
Girl, the way you shine
Got the whole room watching you
Happy birthday, my love
Let the music move
Everybody deadest
Pero I'm only seeing you
Let's go
Another year looks
Good on you, good on you
Still my favorite face
Till my dream come true
Raise the glass up high
Let the candles burn
It's looom
Feliz cumpleanos baby
Another year looks good on you
Whoo-whoo-whoo baby, baby
Ooh, ooh, ooh
Looks good on you
Oh, my, baby
Everything you do
Aye, baby, baby
Me birthday view
Another year looks good on you
Ooh, ooh!
New phone paid off
Shiny cameras shine
But even that camera knows you're the real thing
headline playlist on loop now birthday party
groove all your bark out around you everybody's
in the mood you laugh like sunshine dancing to
the track tiny queens in every dream but you
discard it can't outmatch gardening on weekends
flowers in your hand pero we call get them roses
that made me
understand and i don't need a wish tonight
i already got mine wrapped in a birthday
dress looking way too fine mi vida baby copa
longa it's true cada año mas bendita just to live
with you another year looks good on you good on
you good on you girl the way you shine got the
whole room watching you happy birthday my love
let the music move everybody dance pero i'm only
seeing you let's go
another
year
looks good on you good on you still my favorite
face still my dream come true raise the glass up
high let the candles bloom my lipa yunga
birthday baby another year looks good on you

analysis.summary: This celebratory birthday anthem honors a radiant partner who requires no spotlight to shine, framing their aging as an enhancement rather than a decline while blending intimate R&B vocals with euphoric dance beats.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A woman glowing with an inner golden light that illuminates the entire room, casting soft rays on her face and hands.
Skin illuminated by candlelight reflecting a healthy, vibrant warmth against a dark midnight background.
A bright stage spotlight hitting an empty floor while the audience looks naturally at one central figure without it.
Silk fabric shimmering in low light, wrapping around a figure that exudes confidence and timeless beauty.
Flames dancing gently on cake candles casting flickering shadows of love across a party table.
Fresh red roses held in hands, dew drops glistening under soft ambient lighting near green garden leaves.
